final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid for a young woman inspired by Zhao Ling'er from Chinese Paladin (仙剑奇侠传), reimagined in a modern casual setting.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style character design, soft rounded features, expressive stylized proportions
Composition: 3x3 grid layout, 9 equal square panels, each panel framed as "peeking through a torn hole in white paper" with torn paper edges visible, medium close-up head-and-shoulders framing
Subject: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses, consistent facial features and hairstyle across all 9 panels, varied expressions and outfits per panel
Scene/backdrop: plain neutral background behind the torn paper holes, focus entirely on character expressions and paper frame motif
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting, warm and friendly atmosphere, consistent illumination across all panels
Color palette: varied outfit colors per panel (green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal) against white torn paper and neutral backdrop
Materials/textures: smooth Pixar-style skin rendering, fabric texture variation per outfit, crisp torn paper edges with subtle fiber detail
Text (verbatim): "仙剑奇侠传"
Constraints: must maintain character consistency across all 9 panels; hair and glasses must be identical; only expression, outfit, and pose change; grid must be perfectly aligned 3x3
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, anime style, inconsistent character appearance between panels, missing torn paper frame, gradients on paper, watermark, 8K stuffer words
